title: America is now the crypto capital of the world, CFTC's Selig says as digital asset rules take shape
message_html: America is now the crypto capital of the world, CFTC's Selig says as digital asset rules take shape ...
snippet: CFTC Chair Michael Selig said the agency is drafting asset taxonomy, DeFi guidance and leveraged trading rules.
